dataset_title: The neural dynamics of working memory and transcranial magnetic stimulation
notes: OpenAlex resolves the DOI to work id W7167798138 (cited_by_count: 0, counts_by_year: []). The filter query works?filter=cites:W7167798138 returns no results consistent with that zero count. A fallback Europe PMC search for the dataset accession ds008037 also returns zero hits. The dataset was only published on OpenNeuro on 2026-07-09 (12 days before this analysis on 2026-07-21), so no citing literature has had time to appear yet. This is an unused/very new dataset, not a saturated one -- 'low' saturation reflects total absence of citing works rather than exhaustive-but-narrow use.
